research_basis: Architecture decision records preserve design rationale and consequences.
Directed acyclic graphs provide verifiable ordering for dependent work.
Clear ownership prevents orphaned components and unaccountable risk.
rules: Architecture components must form a directed acyclic graph.
Every component must have owner, authority, and accountability.
Every component must declare owned outputs.
Every architecture must trace components to OFM outcomes and success criteria.
High-risk components cannot be ownerless or accountability-free.
